zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebles II de Ramerupt於1055年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪時，他的父親Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier45歲，母親Adelaide de Roucy41歲。他和Sybille de Hauteville至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1103年5月之後。

zh-hans.Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France: 法国皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪

zh-hans.Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardennnes, Fra: 法国哈帕格-亞登奧布拉莫盧普特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebles II de Ramerupt于1055年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆蒙特迪迪时，他的父亲Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier45岁，母亲Adelaide de Roucy41岁。他和Sybille de Hauteville至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1103年5月之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ebles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant either of   Ellis   or   Ells  .
Dutch and German: variant of   Ellens  .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: From a medieval vernacular form of   Elias  , in use as a given name in northern England from the 14th century onwards. In modern use it is often a transferred use of the surname derived from this name. In Wales it is now often taken as an Anglicized form of the Old Welsh name Elisud . It has enjoyed considerable popularity in recent times, having also been taken up as a girl's name.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Ebles II de Ramerupt was born in 1055, in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier, was 45 and his mother, Adelaide de Roucy, was 41. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sybille de Hauteville. He died after May 1103.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebles II de Ramerupt est né en 1055, à Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Roucy, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Sybille de Hauteville. Il est décédé après mai 1103.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebles II de Ramerupt 1055 in Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier 45 und seine Mutter Adelaide de Roucy 41. Er hatte mit Sybille de Hauteville mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach Mai 1103.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles II de Ramerupt è nato il nel 1055 nel Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide de Roucy, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Sybille de Hauteville. Morì dopo il maggio 1103.

ja.Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメモントディディエル
ja.Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンロウシ
ja.Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardennnes, Fra: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベラムルプト
ja.Of, Roucy, Aisne, France: フランスピカーディエイスンロウシ
ja.lifeSummary: Ebles II de Rameruptが1055年にフランスピカーディソンメモントディディエルで生まれた時，父Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidierは45歳，母Adelaide de Roucyは41歳であった。彼はSybille de Hautevilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1103年5月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebles II de Ramerupt(이)가 1055년 프랑스 피카디 솜 몽디디어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide de Roucy(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Sybille de Hauteville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1103년 5월 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles II de Ramerupt nasceu em 1055, em Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Roucy, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Sybille de Hauteville. Ele faleceu após maio de 1103.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebles II de Ramerupt родился в 1055 г. в местности монтдидиир, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Roucy, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Sybille de Hauteville. Он умер после май 1103 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebles II de Ramerupt nació en 1055, en Montdidier, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Hilduin IV de Ramerupt de Montdidier, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Roucy, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Sybille de Hauteville. Murió después de mayo de 1103.
